description:
The Modrinth App is a unique, open source Minecraft launcher that allows you to play your favorite mods, and keep them up to date, all in one neat little package.


Note: Modrinth App v0.13.5 was skipped due to technical issues, it's changelog has been merged into this release.
Changed
- Renamed the Browse page filter from "Hide installed content/added servers" to "Hide already installed content/added servers".
- Content installed and servers added from an instance now stay visible on the Browse page until the search query or filters change.
- Modrinth Hosting: Server panel banners now stack more cleanly when multiple banners are shown.
- Modrinth Hosting: The Backups tab now matches the rest of the server panel design.
- Modrinth Hosting: Server panel banners now use clearer text.
- Modrinth Hosting: Renamed the Discover page filter from "Hide installed content" to "Hide already installed content".
- Modrinth Hosting: Content installed from the Discover page now stays visible until the search query or filters change.
- Modrinth Hosting: The server console on the Overview tab now shows a loading animation until historical logs finish loading.

Fixed
- Fixed the instance creation modal incorrectly showing mod loaders as compatible with unsupported game versions.
- Fixed the game version and loader version dropdowns appearing empty for a few seconds in the instance creation modal.
- Modrinth Hosting: Fixed backup creation and restoration failing in some cases.
- Modrinth Hosting: Fixed the server setup and reset modals incorrectly showing mod loaders as compatible with unsupported game versions.
- Modrinth Hosting: Fixed the game version and loader version dropdowns appearing empty for a few seconds in the server setup and reset modals.

Added
- Modrinth Hosting: Multi-select on the Backups tab for bulk deleting backups.
- Modrinth Hosting: Manual and automatic backup filters on the Backups tab.
